---
title: "Problem Set 0"
subtitle: Due Friday September 4 at 5PM
editor: 
  mode: source
---

> [Nature laughs at the difficulties of integration.](https://en.wikiquote.org/wiki/Pierre-Simon_Laplace)

This is ostensibly calculus review, but each problem is a piece of probability in disguise. We will illuminate these connections throughout the semester, and I will refer to Problem Set 0 often. Stay tuned!

## Problem 0

{{< include bank/_music-rec.qmd >}}

## Problem 1

{{< include bank/math-review/bad-notation.qmd >}}

## Problem 2

{{< include bank/math-review/logexp.qmd >}}

## Problem 3

{{< include bank/math-review/poisson.qmd >}}

## Problem 4

{{< include bank/math-review/bell-curve.qmd >}}

## Problem 5

{{< include bank/math-review/gamma.qmd >}}

## Problem 6

{{< include bank/math-review/limit.qmd >}}

## Problem 7

{{< include bank/math-review/pareto-ish.qmd >}}

## Submission

{{< include bank/_submission.qmd >}}
